summary: Taiki has pivoted from a sustained bearish short position to explicitly calling a market bottom in his most recent video.
narrative: After capitalizing on a multi-month bearish thesis against Ethereum, his latest analysis suggests the market has bottomed and identifies potential catalysts to propel Bitcoin higher. He warns against standard 4-year cycle theories, arguing instead that current conditions support a new upward trend.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
